  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;

}

/* Make text look crisper and more legible in all browsers */
body {
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  font-smoothing: antialiased;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

/* Focus state style for keyboard navigation for the focusable elements */
*[tabindex]:focus-visible,
  input[type="file"]:focus-visible {
   outline: 0.125rem solid #4d65ff;
   outline-offset: 0.125rem;
}

/* Get rid of top margin on first element in any rich text element */
.w-richtext > :not(div):first-child, .w-richtext > div:first-child > :first-child {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

/* Get rid of bottom margin on last element in any rich text element */
.w-richtext>:last-child, .w-richtext ol li:last-child, .w-richtext ul li:last-child {
	margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

/* Prevent all click and hover interaction with an element */
.pointer-events-off {
	pointer-events: none;
}

/* Enables all click and hover interaction with an element */
.pointer-events-on {
  pointer-events: auto;
}

/* Create a class of .div-square which maintains a 1:1 dimension of a div */
.div-square::after {
	content: "";
	display: block;
	padding-bottom: 100%;
}

/* Make sure containers never lose their center alignment */
.container-medium,.container-small, .container-large {
	margin-right: auto !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
}

/* 
Make the following elements inherit typography styles from the parent and not have hardcoded values. 
Important: You will not be able to style for example "All Links" in Designer with this CSS applied.
Uncomment this CSS to use it in the project. Leave this message for future hand-off.
*/

  color: inherit;

}
*/

/* Apply "..." after 3 lines of text */
.text-style-3lines {
	display: -webkit-box;
	overflow: hidden;
	-webkit-line-clamp: 3;
	-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
}

/* Apply "..." after 2 lines of text */
.text-style-2lines {
	display: -webkit-box;
	overflow: hidden;
	-webkit-line-clamp: 2;
	-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
}

/* Adds inline flex display */
.display-inlineflex {
  display: inline-flex;
}

/* These classes are never overwritten */
.hide {
  display: none !important;
}

value</p></div><a href="#solutions" class="button is-icon w-inline-block"><div>solutions</div><div class="button-icon"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff4748dcd9d1f8_arrow-line-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="arrow-line"/><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff476c32d9d1f7_chevron-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="chevron-icon"/></div></a></div></div><div class="awards_component"><p class="awards_eyebrow">Award-Winning Excellence in Growth and Innovation</p><div class="awards_list_wrapper w-dyn-list"><div role="list" class="awards_list w-dyn-items"><div role="listitem" class="awards_item w-dyn-item"><a href="https://www.ft.com/content/cb3e317e-e3cc-4e4a-a506-b755b2f94bb1" target="_blank" class="awards_link w-inline-block"><img class="awards_item w-dyn-item"><a href="https://www.theeuropas.com/nominees-1" target="_blank" class="awards_link w-inline-block"><img w-dyn-item"><a href="https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/france-2024?utm_medium=social&amp;utm_source=linkedin&amp;utm_campaign=france_leaderboard&amp;utm_content=startups" target="_blank" class="awards_link w-inline-block"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/681229d517bbc1292b0e3570_sifted.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="awards_logo"/></a></div><div role="listitem" class="awards_item w-dyn-item"><a class="awards_logo"/></a></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><section data-w-id="9dc438d2-917d-8fff-c9d5-ad207a3e5ad5" class="section_home-publishers"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div class="padding-section-large"><div class="publishers-component"><div class="publishers_component_top"><div class="sparteo-icon-glass-wrapper"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff471fb2d9d1fe_sparteo-icon-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="sparteo-icon-white"/><div class="sparteo-icon-glass"><div class="sparteo-icon-glass-effect"></div></div></div><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff472cb8d9d22f_sparteo-small.svg" loading="lazy" alt=""/></div><div class="margin-bottom margin-medium"><div class="container-small"><div class="margin-bottom margin-medium"><h2 class="text-color-white text-align-center">Publishers, Ad Network,<br/>enlighten your business</h2></div><p class="text-size-large text-weight-light text-color-white text-align-center">Get a comprehensive and sustainable suite of data-driven advertising technologies, powered by artificial intelligence.</p></div></div><div class="margin-bottom margin-xxlarge"><a href="/our-mission" class="button is-icon is-transparent w-inline-block"><div>Our mission</div><div class="button-icon"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff4748dcd9d1f8_arrow-line-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="arrow-line"/><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff476c32d9d1f7_chevron-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="chevron-icon"/></div></a></div><div class="margin-bottom margin-xxlarge"><div class="w-layout-grid _4col-grid"><div data-w-id="e60b322c-8e9c-a701-22c7-ebec8579de54" style="opacity:0" class="publisher_card"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff479f31d9d20d_one-stop-shop.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="publisher_card-icon"/><div class="margin-bottom margin-xsmall"><h3 class="heading-style-h4 text-color-white">One stop shop</h3></div><p class="text-color-white opacity-70">Advertising solutions, analytics, regulatory compliance... Our suite of powerful and easy-to-use tools is designed to meet all your needs!</p></div><div data-w-id="f53f7713-74f8-4140-3fff-5b0730b7e87e" style="opacity:0" class="publisher_card"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff4727c1d9d20e_data.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="publisher_card-icon"/><div class="margin-bottom margin-xsmall"><h3 class="heading-style-h4 text-color-white">The power of data to drive success</h3></div><p class="text-color-white opacity-70">We use first-party data so you can make informed decisions with the best possible insights. We deliver the highest quality solutions through our unique position in the publisher ecosystem.</p></div><div data-w-id="43070de9-8fbf-cd50-aa2d-d9fadb6b7495" style="opacity:0" class="publisher_card"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff479d53d9d210_supply-path.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="publisher_card-icon"/><div class="margin-bottom margin-xsmall"><h3 class="heading-style-h4 text-color-white">Supply Path Optimization</h3></div><p class="text-color-white opacity-70">We maximize efficiency by eliminating intermediaries and redundancies, resulting in more revenue being redistributed to our customers.</p></div><div data-w-id="8e238af2-3d7a-ef52-2550-20d8077f0ac5" style="opacity:0" class="publisher_card"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff47bb3ed9d228_same-boat.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="publisher_card-icon"/><div class="margin-bottom margin-xsmall"><h3 class="heading-style-h4 text-color-white">We are in the same boat</h3></div><p class="text-color-white opacity-70">We align our success with yours. Our solutions are tailored to your needs, and we only make money when you do. Therefore, you can be sure we&#x27;re fully invested in helping you succeed!</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></section><section id="solutions" data-w-id="dfbfe393-b009-e68e-4dc0-b3b6dfd23326" class="section_home-solutions"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div data-w-id="cfa3ebf2-d48b-49e1-6415-edd4a6c10b4b" style="opacity:0" class="solutions-tabs_wrapper"><div class="solutions-tabs_title-wrapper"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff475892d9d215_sparteo-black-icon.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="solutions-tabs_icon"/><h2 class="solutions-tabs_title">Solutions</h2></div><div data-current="Actirise" data-easing="linear" data-duration-in="0" data-duration-out="500" class="solutions-tabs w-tabs"><div class="solutions-tabs_menu w-tab-menu"><a data-w-tab="Actirise" class="solutions-tabs_link is-01 w-inline-block w-tab-link w--current"><div bind="fd3a3217-bf02-766c-1919-c67e078711ed" class="solutions-tabs_link-image w-embed"><svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></div><div id="w-node-_333fe0ab-efd0-9817-73f6-a6a17681bd58-4ad9d1bb" class="solutions-tabs_content-right"><h3 class="solutions-heading">Consent Management Platform</h3><p class="text-size-medium text-weight-light">FastCMP streamlines consent management with a high-performing CMP, specifically designed to fit the publishers’ advertising ecosystem and ensure compliance with privacy regulations.</p><a href="https://www.fastcmp.com/" target="_blank" class="button-small is-icon w-inline-block"><div>Visit website</div><div class="button-icon-small"><div bind="333fe0ab-efd0-9817-73f6-a6a17681bd63" class="button-icon-small-arrow w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div><div bind="333fe0ab-efd0-9817-73f6-a6a17681bd64" class="button-icon-small-line w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></a></div></div></div></div><div data-w-tab="Meetscale" class="w-tab-pane"><div class="tab_content"><div class="w-layout-grid solutions-tabs_content-grid"><div id="w-node-_7e1de222-bc69-acaf-fed5-e84c3c458389-4ad9d1bb" class="solutions-tabs_left"><div class="solutions-tabs_content-left meetscale"><div bind="2ebf49d7-9d7a-545f-fe01-ffd9b55dade8" class="solutions_icon-big w-embed"><svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 275 319" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<g style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light">
<path d="M275 159.422L137.772 80.1727V0.966309L275 80.1727V159.422Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_1480_2635)"/>
<path d="M137.772 318.136L0.543396 238.886V159.637L137.772 238.886V318.136Z" fill="url(#paint1_linear_1480_2635)"/>
<path d="M0.543518 159.426L69.1576 119.823L137.772 80.2199L69.1576 40.5952L0.543518 80.2199V159.426Z" fill="url(#paint2_linear_1480_2635)"/>

</defs>
</svg></div></div><div id="w-node-_7ad308f4-6a57-fd0b-41fd-700258d97039-4ad9d1bb" class="solutions-tabs_content-right"><h3>Audio technologies</h3><p>Voxeus&#x27; mission is to democratize audio. As brands and media outlets invest in this new approach, Voxeus develops technology, content and services to support them.</p><a href="https://www.voxeus.com/" target="_blank" class="button-small is-icon w-inline-block"><div>Visit website</div><div class="button-icon-small"><div bind="7ad308f4-6a57-fd0b-41fd-700258d97044" class="button-icon-small-arrow w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M1 1H11V11" stroke="CurrentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg></div><div bind="7ad308f4-6a57-fd0b-41fd-700258d97045" class="button-icon-small-line w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M1 11L11 1" stroke="CurrentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg></div></div></a></div></div></div></div><div class="solutions-left-arrow w-slider-arrow-left"><div bind="bdf20342-4924-1cf4-ecc1-d64e9a973110" class="w-icon-slider-left"></div></div><div class="solutions-right-arrow w-slider-arrow-right"><div bind="bdf20342-4924-1cf4-ecc1-d64e9a973112" class="w-icon-slider-right"></div></div><div class="solutions-slide-nav w-slider-nav w-slider-nav-invert w-round"></div></div></div></div></div></section><section class="section_home-news hide"><div class="padding-global"><div class="container-large"><div class="padding-section-large"><div class="news_component"><div class="news_head"><h2>Latest from Sparteo</h2><a href="/blog" class="button is-icon w-inline-block"><div>View all articles</div><div class="button-icon"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff4748dcd9d1f8_arrow-line-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="arrow-line"/><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff473a95d9d1b8/6422be9481ff476c32d9d1f7_chevron-white.svg" loading="lazy" alt="" class="chevron-icon"/></div></a></div><div bind="0a889ce7-a0d6-031b-09ee-7b596161640e" class="news_list-wrapper w-dyn-list"><div bind="0a889ce7-a0d6-031b-09ee-7b596161640f" role="list" class="news_list w-dyn-items"><div bind="0a889ce7-a0d6-031b-09ee-7b5961616410" role="listitem" class="news_item w-dyn-item"><div id="w-node-b255a86a-7c4f-d530-498a-f2a8b62c7e41-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_top"><div id="w-node-_02d07c94-5c2d-de52-6b63-8f08caa06fa0-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_infos"><div class="news-item_enterprise"><img bind="825ea95b-bc7e-62c5-f397-b9f05eff2412" loading="lazy" data-sizes="[{&quot;max&quot;:10000,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;100vw&quot;}]" src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6422be9481ff47038ed9d1db_icon-fastcmp.avif" alt="" class="news_item_enterprise_icon"/><div bind="c6c4b502-cb41-7ee9-27d4-a50a80222b27">Fastcmp</div></div><div bind="8654b87b-2017-edbc-207d-9700b2bb7ab0" class="news_item_date">May 7, 2025</div></div><div id="w-node-e4e8f1e8-309b-1800-13ca-f4b7ce54b01e-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_image-wrapper"><div bind="48db7ec5-50bd-13b4-45b6-e02f71ff13a6" style="background-image:url(&quot;https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/68245d9f2549e226f86125b0_Banner_Fastcmp-Google_High%20(1).png&quot;)" class="news_item_image"></div><div bind="9ed59eb6-d582-ed3f-0de7-2095beb9c5e1" style="background-image:url(&quot;https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6422be9481ff473ef4d9d362_placeholder-fastcmp.svg&quot;)" class="news_item_placeholder w-condition-invisible"></div></div><div id="w-node-_47e35f81-035e-d43f-033d-e2782ec5ced4-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_content-wrapper"><p bind="89cab5d0-c8c8-9c57-e6f0-f1f7d4e3f27d" class="news_item_title">FastCMP Now Supports Google Consent Mode v2: Simplify Compliance and Preserve Performance</p><p bind="b8cc4ce8-aca0-88a7-608e-dded40bb5233" class="news_item_summary text-style-2lines">We’re excited to announce that FastCMP now supports Google Consent Mode v2. This integration ensures your website remains compliant with the latest privacy regulations while maintaining measurement and performance. FastCMP automatically handles all consent signals—including the new ad_user_data and ad_personalization markers—without requiring manual setup. Whether you’re using Tag Manager, gtag.js, or FastCMP’s built-in tools, implementation is seamless and fully aligned with IAB TCF standards.</p></div></div><a bind="a25b6197-5fec-85ce-4031-fb7b3f00b4dc" href="/post/fastcmp-now-supports-google-consent-mode-v2-simplify-compliance-and-preserve-performance" class="button-small is-icon w-inline-block"><div>Read article</div><div class="button-icon-small"><div bind="a25b6197-5fec-85ce-4031-fb7b3f00b4e0" class="button-icon-small-arrow w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M1 1H11V11" stroke="CurrentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg></div><div bind="a25b6197-5fec-85ce-4031-fb7b3f00b4e1" class="button-icon-small-line w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path d="M1 11L11 1" stroke="CurrentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg></div></div></a></div><div bind="0a889ce7-a0d6-031b-09ee-7b5961616410" role="listitem" class="news_item w-dyn-item"><div id="w-node-b255a86a-7c4f-d530-498a-f2a8b62c7e41-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_top"><div id="w-node-_02d07c94-5c2d-de52-6b63-8f08caa06fa0-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_infos"><div class="news-item_enterprise"><img bind="825ea95b-bc7e-62c5-f397-b9f05eff2412" loading="lazy" data-sizes="[{&quot;max&quot;:10000,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;100vw&quot;}]" src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6422be9481ff47c7bdd9d1d9_icon-actirise.avif" alt="" class="news_item_enterprise_icon"/><div bind="c6c4b502-cb41-7ee9-27d4-a50a80222b27">Actirise</div></div><div bind="8654b87b-2017-edbc-207d-9700b2bb7ab0" class="news_item_date">April 30, 2025</div></div><div id="w-node-e4e8f1e8-309b-1800-13ca-f4b7ce54b01e-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_image-wrapper"><div bind="48db7ec5-50bd-13b4-45b6-e02f71ff13a6" style="background-image:url(&quot;https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6811f0f930fcb5b21c51c1e3_Sparteo%20-%20Case%20Study%20-%20LCHF.png&quot;)" class="news_item_image"></div><div bind="9ed59eb6-d582-ed3f-0de7-2095beb9c5e1" style="background-image:url(&quot;https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6422be9481ff47951cd9d360_placeholder-actirise.svg&quot;)" class="news_item_placeholder w-condition-invisible"></div></div><div id="w-node-_47e35f81-035e-d43f-033d-e2782ec5ced4-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_content-wrapper"><p bind="89cab5d0-c8c8-9c57-e6f0-f1f7d4e3f27d" class="news_item_title">Sparteo Boosts LCHF-arkivet&#x27;s RPM by 50% while balancing ad strategy with reader experience</p><p bind="b8cc4ce8-aca0-88a7-608e-dded40bb5233" class="news_item_summary text-style-2lines">50% RPM boost in 2 months—without compromising reader experience?
That’s what LCHF-arkivet achieved with Sparteo’s Actirise solution. By unifying video and display ads under one smart system, we helped Sweden’s leading low-carb recipe site turn ad chaos into cohesive revenue—while preserving the clean, helpful UX their readers count on. Key wins: ✅ +50% RPM
✅ Smarter, AI-driven ad placement
✅ Better Core Web Vitals
✅ Ongoing support &amp; real-time analytics 📚 Read how a site born from personal health struggles became a monetization success story—with its mission intact. #AdTech #PublisherSuccess #UserExperience #AI #Sparteo #Actirise</p></div></div><a bind="a25b6197-5fec-85ce-4031-fb7b3f00b4dc" href="/post/sparteo-boosts-lchf-arkivets-rpm-by-50-while-balancing-ad-strategy-with-reader-experience" class="button-small is-icon w-inline-block"><div>Read article</div><div class="button-icon-small"><div bind="a25b6197-5fec-85ce-4031-fb7b3f00b4e0" class="button-icon-small-arrow w-embed"><svg fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></div></a></div><div bind="0a889ce7-a0d6-031b-09ee-7b5961616410" role="listitem" class="news_item w-dyn-item"><div id="w-node-b255a86a-7c4f-d530-498a-f2a8b62c7e41-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_top"><div id="w-node-_02d07c94-5c2d-de52-6b63-8f08caa06fa0-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_infos"><div class="news-item_enterprise"><img bind="825ea95b-bc7e-62c5-f397-b9f05eff2412" loading="lazy" data-sizes="[{&quot;max&quot;:10000,&quot;size&quot;:&quot;100vw&quot;}]" src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6422be9481ff47c7bdd9d1d9_icon-actirise.avif" alt="" class="news_item_enterprise_icon"/><div bind="c6c4b502-cb41-7ee9-27d4-a50a80222b27">Actirise</div></div><div bind="8654b87b-2017-edbc-207d-9700b2bb7ab0" class="news_item_date">January 23, 2025</div></div><div id="w-node-e4e8f1e8-309b-1800-13ca-f4b7ce54b01e-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_image-wrapper"><div bind="48db7ec5-50bd-13b4-45b6-e02f71ff13a6" style="background-image:url(&quot;https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/679a01be73e9b9e5cdb43053_Banner_Pixalate-2025_V2.png&quot;)" class="news_item_image"></div><div bind="9ed59eb6-d582-ed3f-0de7-2095beb9c5e1" style="background-image:url(&quot;https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6422be9481ff47e352d9d1cc/6422be9481ff47951cd9d360_placeholder-actirise.svg&quot;)" class="news_item_placeholder w-condition-invisible"></div></div><div id="w-node-_47e35f81-035e-d43f-033d-e2782ec5ced4-4ad9d1bb" class="news_item_content-wrapper"><p bind="89cab5d0-c8c8-9c57-e6f0-f1f7d4e3f27d" class="news_item_title">Actirise Ranks #1 WEB SSP in France: A Milestone Achievement</p><p bind="b8cc4ce8-aca0-88a7-608e-dded40bb5233" class="news_item_summary text-style-2lines">Actirise secures the #1 spot as the top WEB SSP in France, marking a significant milestone in programmatic advertising.
